description.content: Sends a one-time password to a registered and active user.
Resends OTP for a registered and active user. Available only after 1 minute from the previous OTP issue time.

response.name: OTP can be resent only after 1 minute

description.content: Verifies OTP, sets refresh token cookie, and returns access token payload.
HttpOnly refresh token cookie
Issues a new access token using refreshToken cookie.

Detailed API documentation generated from the current Express routes and validators.

Authentication model:
- Most routes require Bearer JWT via Authorization header.
- Refresh endpoint uses a refreshToken cookie.
